records.assessment_notes: Credible decorative bathroom, but it is a beige and timber showroom image reused across 13 routes. It does not show the specific storage, shower, towel or under-sink planning issues claimed by its guide alt text.
records.recommended_concept: A compact Australian bathroom with a vanity, shower storage and towel zone visible in one practical, lived-in scene.
records.important_objects: Vanity drawers, under-sink plumbing, towel hooks, shower caddy, realistic circulation space.
records.avoid: Luxury-spa styling, all-beige finishes, oversized room proportions, decorative objects that conceal storage.
records.suggested_alt_text: A compact bathroom showing vanity, shower and towel storage zones with clear floor space.

records.assessment_notes: A plausible but generic neutral bedroom reused across 12 routes. The dresser, wardrobe, under-bed storage and lighting details described by different guides are not all present.
records.recommended_concept: A modest Australian bedroom where the bed footprint, bedside zone, wardrobe access and one useful storage feature can be read clearly.
records.important_objects: Bed, bedside table and lamp, wardrobe doors, under-bed clearance, realistic walking path.
records.avoid: Hotel styling, beige-on-beige bedding, oversized room proportions, concealed storage details.
records.suggested_alt_text: A modest bedroom showing bedside storage, wardrobe access and clear walking space around the bed.

records.phase_1_note: Retained on its original bedroom-storage guide and temporarily reused for the Mattress Sizes hero and featured card because it truthfully shows the bed footprint, wardrobe relationship and walking clearance.
records.assessment_notes: Useful intentional after image with the same viewpoint as its companion and a clear circulation improvement.

records.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for audit history but has no source or built public reference. The Coffee Machine Types article and featured card now use the existing text-only presentation.
records.assessment_notes: The image presents a fabricated retail-style lineup of recognisable machine types with invented controls in a forced cobalt and coral set. A commercial-intent guide should not imply that fictional products were assessed.
records.recommended_concept: One believable kitchen bench divided into three unbranded workflow zones: pod preparation, manual espresso preparation and automatic bean-to-cup preparation.
records.important_objects: Unbranded machines, cups, beans, portafilter, pod drawer, water access, bench depth and realistic working clearance.
records.avoid: Logos, fake labels, recognisable copies of branded machines, impossible controls, product-lineup advertising composition.
records.suggested_alt_text: Three unbranded coffee preparation setups showing pod, manual espresso and automatic workflows on a kitchen bench.

usages.alt: Stainless steel, cast iron, nonstick and carbon steel cookware arranged on a timber kitchen bench
Stainless steel, cast iron, nonstick and carbon steel cookware on a timber kitchen bench.
Stainless steel, cast iron, nonstick and carbon steel cookware on a timber kitchen bench.
Stainless steel, cast iron, nonstick and carbon steel cookware arranged on a timber kitchen bench

alt_texts: Stainless steel, cast iron, nonstick and carbon steel cookware arranged on a timber kitchen bench
Stainless steel, cast iron, nonstick and carbon steel cookware on a timber kitchen bench.
records.assessment_notes: The material differences are easy to compare and no branding is visible. A modest colour and exposure edit would reduce the dominant timber surface and make the cookware the clearer focus.

records.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for replacement review but has no source or built public reference. The guide temporarily uses living-room-storage-everyday-zones.webp and its featured Guides card is text-only.
records.assessment_notes: The handling pose is broadly plausible, but the generic product resembles a branded design and the heavily themed cobalt, coral and yellow room repeats the recent generated-image look. It shows use, not storage or charging.
records.recommended_concept: A realistic Australian laundry or utility cupboard showing an unbranded cordless stick vacuum being returned to a wall-mounted charging position.
records.important_objects: Stable wall dock, visible but correctly routed charging lead to the dock, vacuum body and attachments, nearby power point, door clearance.
records.avoid: A lead attached to the handheld vacuum, floating dock, recognisable branded silhouette, malformed grip or floor head, theatrical colour blocking.
records.suggested_alt_text: An unbranded cordless stick vacuum beside a wall-mounted charging dock and organised attachments in a utility cupboard.

usages.alt: An open stainless steel dishwasher installed below a kitchen bench showing racks, cabinetry and door clearance
An open stainless steel dishwasher installed below a kitchen bench showing racks, cabinetry and door clearance

alt_texts: An open stainless steel dishwasher installed below a kitchen bench showing racks, cabinetry and door clearance
records.phase_1_note: The article header now uses object-position center 62% so the open door, lower rack and adjacent cabinetry survive the wide crop.
records.assessment_notes: A strong source image showing the open door, racks and adjacent cabinets. The 3:2 source is vertically cropped in the wide hero slot, which risks losing the foreground door-clearance information.

usages.alt: A front loading washer and dryer side by side in a practical Australian laundry with towels and clear floor space
A front loading washer and dryer side by side in a practical Australian laundry with towels and clear floor space

alt_texts: A front loading washer and dryer side by side in a practical Australian laundry with towels and clear floor space
records.phase_1_note: Full-resolution review found no urgent brand, label, cable, installation or geometry defect. Keep temporarily while the more explanatory Phase 1 asset is produced.
records.assessment_notes: The open dryer door and laundry layout are useful, but the image does not explain the heat-pump, condenser and vented comparison or show a ventilation path.
records.recommended_concept: A credible laundry comparison scene showing three installation consequences rather than three branded machines: vent path, condensate drain or tank access, and door clearance.
records.important_objects: Exterior vent or duct route, condensate drain connection or removable tank access, nearby washer, door swing and walking clearance.
records.avoid: Unsafe flexible ducting, sealed vented dryer cupboard, impossible hoses, product logos, three identical fictional appliances.
records.suggested_alt_text: Laundry layouts showing dryer door clearance, a vent route and condensate drainage considerations.

usages.alt: An open bottom mount refrigerator in a warm Australian kitchen showing the surrounding cabinetry and walking space
An open bottom mount refrigerator in a warm Australian kitchen showing its cabinetry opening.
An open bottom mount refrigerator in a warm Australian kitchen showing its cabinetry opening.
An open bottom mount refrigerator in a warm Australian kitchen showing the surrounding cabinetry and walking space

alt_texts: An open bottom mount refrigerator in a warm Australian kitchen showing its cabinetry opening.
An open bottom mount refrigerator in a warm Australian kitchen showing the surrounding cabinetry and walking space
records.phase_1_note: The article header now uses object-position 42% 28%; its Guides card uses 42% center. These positions retain the overhead cavity, open door and nearby island gap.
records.assessment_notes: The cavity, open door and nearby island make this one of the better restored-guide sources. A wide crop should retain the door edge, island gap and overhead clearance rather than centring only the appliance.

usages.alt: A double brick garage with an SUV parked in the left bay, both front doors open, an empty second bay and storage along the right wall

alt_texts: A double brick garage with an SUV parked in the left bay, both front doors open, an empty second bay and storage along the right wall
records.assessment_notes: A practical garage scene with vehicle access, storage and circulation visible together.

usages.alt: A top-down garage plan showing a parked vehicle with both front doors and the tailgate open, passenger and driver exit paths, a straight drive-in line and shallow storage kept clear
A top-down garage plan showing a parked vehicle with both front doors and the tailgate open, passenger and driver exit paths, a straight drive-in line and shallow storage kept clear

alt_texts: A top-down garage plan showing a parked vehicle with both front doors and the tailgate open, passenger and driver exit paths, a straight drive-in line and shallow storage kept clear
records.assessment_notes: Clear instructional diagram. Embedded labels are essential information rather than decorative text.

usages.alt: A home office with an open blue bookcase, terrazzo desk, open divided drawer, desktop computer and managed cables
A home office with an open blue bookcase, terrazzo desk, open divided drawer, desktop computer and managed cables

alt_texts: A home office with an open blue bookcase, terrazzo desk, open divided drawer, desktop computer and managed cables
records.assessment_notes: A credible desk scene, but the cable-management subject is barely visible and the dark grey styling feels like a display office rather than practical editorial evidence.
records.recommended_concept: A lived-in desk shown from a three-quarter side angle so the power board, cable tray and separation of data and power leads are visible.
records.important_objects: Power board mounted off the floor, cable tray, monitor lead, laptop charger, accessible power point and leg clearance.
records.avoid: Hidden cables, unsafe overloaded adaptors, loose leads across feet, sterile showroom styling, unreadable screen text.
records.suggested_alt_text: A home-office desk showing a mounted power board, cable tray and clear leg space.

usages.alt: A home office plan showing daily, occasional and archive storage zones beside a desk, plus an open drawer, chair movement, printer access and a clear walking route

alt_texts: A home office plan showing daily, occasional and archive storage zones beside a desk, plus an open drawer, chair movement, printer access and a clear walking route
records.assessment_notes: A useful planning diagram with clear access and clearance information.

records.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for audit history but has no source or built public reference. The guide temporarily uses bedroom-storage-clear-walkway.webp.
records.assessment_notes: A yellow measuring strip appears built into the mattress with an implausible black device at its end. The artificial product treatment and saturated themed room undermine a dimensional planning guide.
records.recommended_concept: A believable Australian bedroom viewed from the foot or doorway, showing a standard bed footprint and measurable walking clearances to a wardrobe and wall.
records.important_objects: Bed edges, bedside tables, hinged or sliding wardrobe, doorway, visible floor gaps and a normal tape measure placed on the floor.
records.avoid: Tape fused into the mattress, invented labels, floating furniture, luxury-suite proportions, saturated cobalt and terracotta styling.
records.suggested_alt_text: A bedroom showing the bed footprint and walking clearances to the wardrobe, wall and doorway.

records.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for replacement review but has no source or built public reference. The guide and its featured Guides card temporarily use living-room-storage-before-cluttered-zones.webp.
records.assessment_notes: The current file has no cord attached to the robot. It does show a dock, chair legs and rug transition, but the almost empty, heavily themed cobalt and orange room omits the loose obstacles central to the guide and feels generated.
records.recommended_concept: A realistic living area showing an unbranded robot vacuum approaching a rug edge with a dock, chair legs, low furniture and a few plausible loose obstacles in view.
records.important_objects: Unplugged robot away from dock, dock connected correctly to wall power, rug transition, chair legs, low sofa clearance, one cable or pet toy placed as an obstacle.
records.avoid: Any lead attached to the robot, floating dock, impossible reflections, branded lidar design, empty showroom, forced cobalt and terracotta palette.
records.suggested_alt_text: An unbranded robot vacuum navigating a rug edge, furniture legs and loose obstacles near its charging dock.

records.assessment_notes: A close, credible view of the drawer geometry and plumbing cut-out that directly explains the planning issue.

usages.alt: A warm Australian home interior with timber furniture, greenery, kitchen and living spaces
A warm Australian home interior with timber furniture, greenery, kitchen and living spaces

alt_texts: A warm Australian home interior with timber furniture, greenery, kitchen and living spaces
records.assessment_notes: A technically sound but generic beige, pale-timber and muted-green home scene. As the broad homepage image it sets the repetitive visual tone the revised standard is intended to correct.
records.recommended_concept: A contemporary Australian home scene with practical zones, confident but natural colour and a recognisable indoor-outdoor connection.
records.important_objects: Everyday furniture, useful storage, daylight, a glimpse of veranda or garden, varied materials beyond timber.
records.avoid: Luxury display home, beige-on-beige palette, empty styling, American-scale proportions, decorative clutter.
records.suggested_alt_text: A contemporary Australian living area with practical storage, natural light and an indoor-outdoor connection.

usages.alt: A warm home office with a timber desk, greenery and soft natural light

records.assessment_notes: Generic timber desk styling reused across office guides with different planning claims. It does not show storage access, cable control, lighting or ergonomic clearances with enough specificity.
records.recommended_concept: A compact working home office with desk depth, chair clearance, storage access, task light and cable route all visible.
records.important_objects: Desk, adjustable chair, drawer or shelf access, power point and cable tray, task light, window glare control.
records.avoid: Decorative laptop-only desk, all-timber palette, hidden cables, unreadable screen text, oversized executive office.
records.suggested_alt_text: A compact home office showing chair clearance, accessible storage, task lighting and managed cables.

records.assessment_notes: The most heavily reused category fallback after the brand assets. It is a generic beige and timber display kitchen serving 14 routes whose specific appliance, pantry, storage and workflow details are not visible.
records.recommended_concept: A practical Australian kitchen where one clear work triangle, appliance landing area, pantry access and drawer zone can be read without luxury styling.
records.important_objects: Fridge cavity, sink, cooktop, appliance landing space, open drawer or pantry door, realistic aisle width.
records.avoid: Pale timber everywhere, oversized island, sterile styling, impossible appliance clearances, decorative props obscuring work surfaces.
records.suggested_alt_text: A practical kitchen showing appliance landing space, pantry access, drawers and a clear working aisle.

records.assessment_notes: A polished grey and timber laundry reused across 14 routes. It cannot honestly support guide-specific alt text about top loaders, renters, narrow rooms, hampers, drying or linen storage.
records.recommended_concept: A modest Australian laundry with a front loader, usable bench, hamper, drying option and circulation path visible.
records.important_objects: Appliance cavity, nearby power and plumbing, door swing, hamper, drying rail or outdoor access, clear working space.
records.avoid: Display-home scale, concealed services, unsafe stacked appliances, all-grey cabinetry, props hiding clearances.
records.suggested_alt_text: A compact laundry showing appliance space, bench, hamper, drying area and clear working access.

records.assessment_notes: A generic beige and timber living room reused across 12 routes. It does not explain TV placement, cable control, toy storage, traffic flow or small-room layout.
records.recommended_concept: An ordinary Australian living room with a readable TV wall, seating path, closed and open storage, and one everyday activity zone.
records.important_objects: Sofa, TV wall or media unit, cable route, storage, doorway path, rug edge and realistic viewing distance.
records.avoid: Luxury showroom, beige-on-beige styling, fireplace as default focal point, impossible TV height, hidden circulation.
records.suggested_alt_text: A living room showing TV placement, practical storage and a clear path around the seating area.

records.assessment_notes: Apparently unused. The dark stone and timber room feels niche and high-end rather than representative; replace only if the file is brought back into use.

records.important_objects: TV, seating, visible viewing path, power and cable route, controlled daylight.
records.avoid: Cinema mansion styling, stone feature walls as default, impossible screen height, hidden wiring access.
records.suggested_alt_text: A modest media room showing TV height, seating distance and accessible cable routes.

records.assessment_notes: Apparently unused, but it is a credible nursery source with cot, change area and circulation visible. Preserve for possible deliberate reuse.

records.important_objects: Age-appropriate bed or cot, anchored storage, toy zone, change or dressing zone, clear doorway and circulation.
records.avoid: Unanchored tall furniture, unsafe cot objects, beige-only palette, impossible overhead perspective, luxury nursery styling.
records.suggested_alt_text: A compact child’s room showing reachable storage, safe furniture placement and clear floor access.

records.assessment_notes: A pleasant but heavily warm-graded courtyard reused across 13 routes. It does not show the sheds, balconies, hoses, tools, weather exposure or renter constraints described by different guides.
records.recommended_concept: A small Australian courtyard or balcony with shade, weather exposure, outdoor storage and a clear access path visible.
records.important_objects: Storage box or cabinet, hose or tools, door threshold, drainage, covered and exposed zones, compact seating.
records.avoid: Resort garden, orange colour cast, dense styling that hides access, impossible weather protection, American yard scale.
records.suggested_alt_text: A small outdoor area showing weather-exposed storage, drainage and clear access from the house.

records.phase_1_note: The file remains in the repository for audit history but has no source or built public reference. pet-essentials-home-zones.webp is the temporary safe fallback.
records.assessment_notes: This high-reach fallback combines cat furniture, an aquarium, a dog bed and product shelves in one artificial timber showroom. Several package labels are unreadable or invented, making the generated origin obvious across 14 routes.
records.recommended_concept: A contemporary, realistic Australian home pet-care zone with a clearly visible small companion bird in the central crop-safe area, practical closed storage and a clear household walking route.
records.important_objects: A companion bird on a safe perch or beside a coherent cage or stand, closed supply storage, grooming items or toys, protected bowls where included, easy-clean flooring and a clear walkway. A dog bed, lead or feeding station may appear only as a non-living cue to broader pet ownership.
records.avoid: Dog-only or cat-only framing, a cat tree, crowded live animals, bowls in a doorway or main walkway, fake packaging, readable branding, recognisable retail products, fake specialist equipment, all-timber showroom styling and malformed bird, cage or storage geometry.
records.suggested_alt_text: A practical pet-care zone with a companion bird, closed supply storage, grooming items and a clear household walkway.

records.assessment_notes: Apparently unused. A credible dog-bed scene with no visible branding; retain as a possible source for a deliberately matched guide.
A credible author portrait. The automated route scan found no current use, but it should be retained.

alt_texts: Australian Home Collective Outdoor and Garden guides - what to check before you buy
records.assessment_notes: Correct social ratio, but the embedded template and warm-graded generic courtyard do not represent the varied outdoor guides.
records.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of an Australian courtyard showing storage and weather exposure.
records.important_objects: Door threshold, outdoor cabinet or box, exposed and sheltered zones.
records.avoid: Embedded title, logo lockup, orange colour cast, resort styling.
records.suggested_alt_text: A small courtyard showing outdoor storage and weather-exposed access.

alt_texts: Australian Home Collective Pets guides - what to check before you buy
records.phase_1_note: No new AI image was generated during the repository repair. The Pets social image was produced as a deterministic 1200 by 630 derivative of an approved AI-generated source image supplied to the project. No stock or branded photography was introduced.
records.assessment_notes: A safe temporary 1200 by 630 crop of the approved household dog zone. The permanent social treatment should be reviewed again after the final pet category asset is approved.
records.recommended_concept: A clean social crop of the approved inclusive Australian pet-care concept, with a clearly visible companion bird, closed supply storage and safe household circulation.
records.important_objects: A companion bird on a safe perch or beside a coherent cage or stand, closed supply storage, grooming items and a clear walkway, with optional non-living cues to broader pet ownership.
records.avoid: Embedded title, logo lockup, fake packaging or branding, a cat tree, dog-only or cat-only framing, crowded live animals, malformed bird or cage geometry and bowls blocking circulation.
records.suggested_alt_text: A practical pet-care zone with a companion bird, closed supply storage, grooming items and a clear household walkway.

records.assessment_notes: A deliberate publication-level fallback at the correct 1200 by 630 ratio. The wordmark is appropriate here because the asset’s purpose is brand sharing rather than article illustration.
